data.title: Oncor reported Q2 2025 net income of $259 million, up from $251 million in Q2 2024, a $8 million increase.
data.description: In Dallas on August 7, 2025, Oncor Electric Delivery Company LLC (Oncor) disclosed a net income of $259 million for the quarter finishing on June 30, 2025, showcasing growth from the $251 million net income in the same period of 2024. This $8 million rise in net income demonstrates Oncor's financial progress over the respective three-month periods.
Food sourcing company, Where Food Comes From, Inc. releases Q2 2025 financial report.

data.title: Kavalan sets record with double 'Best of the Best Single Malt' win at Tokyo Whisky Competition 2025.
data.description: In a recent announcement, the Tokyo Whisky and Spirits Competition (TWSC) disclosed that their prestigious 'Best of the Best' award, a highly coveted honor, broke records by being conferred on two whiskies for the first time. The eminent accolade was granted during the 2025 edition of the competition in Taipei. The remarkable feat was accomplished by a leading whisky distillery based in Taiwan, marking a significant milestone in the industry. This unprecedented achievement highlights the exceptional quality and distinction of the two awarded whiskies, emphasizing their outstanding performance in the competition. The TWSC faced a rare scenario this year with the dual recipients of the distinguished 'Best of the Best' award, showcasing the innovation and excellence displayed in the world of whiskies.

data.title: 360 Advanced chooses Fieldguide AI for audit engagements, enhancing compliance services. Aug. 7, 2025, St. Petersburg, FL.
data.description: In St. Petersburg, Florida on August 7, 2025, 360 Advanced, a top provider of cybersecurity and compliance services, announced their selection of Fieldguide as their preferred technology for overseeing audit engagements. This decision showcases Fieldguide as the leading AI partner for audit and advisory firms, solidifying their position in the industry.

data.title: VNET Group, Inc. will announce Q2 2025 financial results on August 21, 2025 - a leading internet data center services provider in China.
data.description: On August 7, 2025, VNET Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: VNET), a prominent internet data center services provider in China, revealed plans to release its unaudited financial results for the second quarter of 2025. The company is set to unveil these results on Thursday.

data.title: Oracle offers Extreme Availability and Performance for AI Applications with Globally Distributed Exadata Database on Exascale Infrastructure, reducing costs and providing broad data access.
data.description: Customers now have the opportunity to utilize Oracle's Globally Distributed Exadata Database on Exascale Infrastructure, allowing them to operate various distributed workloads globally. This includes agentic AI, analytics, and transactional tasks while simultaneously reducing costs. The platform offers transparent access to data and boasts the most extensive range of data distribution capabilities in the industry. This advancement has the potential to greatly benefit customers looking to manage large-scale workloads efficiently.

data.title: AEON Pay introduces local bank transfer payment in Mexico through Web3 mobile solution, expanding presence in Latin America.
data.description: In Mexico City on August 7, 2025, AEON, a cutting-edge crypto payment platform, is increasing its presence in Latin America by introducing a local bank transfer payment option in Mexico through its mobile application, AEON Pay. This enhancement allows AEON Pay users in Mexico to access the new feature and...

data.title: Intelligent Bio Solutions Inc. (NASDAQ: INBS) predicts double-digit growth in Q4, expecting another quarter of revenue increase. President and CEO Harry Simeonidis confident in company's strategic investments.
data.description: Intelligent Bio Solutions Inc. (NASDAQ: INBS) recently shared preliminary fiscal fourth quarter revenue data along with operational highlights. The company, specialized in medical technology for rapid and noninvasive testing solutions, saw significant progress in Fiscal 2025. President and CEO Harry Simeonidis expressed that disciplined execution and strategic investments characterized the year. He anticipates another quarter of revenue growth both sequentially and year-over-year. The company is making strides in the global market through a distribution agreement focusing on sweat-based testing. For more details, check out the complete story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Most accurate Wall Street analysts provide insights on 3 real estate stocks with over 7% dividend yields. Benefit from their ratings on Park Hotels & Resorts Inc. (NYSE: PK) with a dividend yield of 9.65%. JP Morgan analyst initiated coverage with an Underweight rating and $10 price target on June 23, 2025. Truist Securities analyst downgraded the stock from Buy to Hold.
data.description: In times of market instability, many investors seek out dividend-yielding stocks known for high free cash flows. These stocks reward shareholders with significant dividend payouts. To access the latest analyst opinions on top stocks, Benzinga offers an Analyst Stock Ratings page with a wealth of data, including analyst accuracy ratings. Below are ratings from the most precise analysts for three high-yielding real estate stocks. Park Hotels & Resorts Inc. (NYSE: PK) boasts a 9.65% dividend yield. JP Morgan’s Daniel Politzer, with a 64% accuracy rate, gave the stock an Underweight rating and a $10 price target on June 23, 2025. Truist Securities’ Patrick Scholes downgraded the stock from Buy to Hold and decreased the price target from $16... For the complete article, refer to Benzinga.com.

data.title: Burford Capital reports strong revenue growth in Q2 2025. Raised $500M in capital. Will hold investor call on Aug 7.
data.description: Burford Capital Limited has reported its unaudited financial results for the second quarter and first half of 2025. The CEO, Christopher Bogart, stated that the company experienced significant increases in revenue and profitability during this period. They also secured a substantial amount of new business, indicating strong demand and a healthy pipeline. In July, Burford successfully raised half a billion dollars in new capital in just two days. The company will hold a conference call for investors and analysts on August 7 at 9.00am EDT to discuss these results. Dial-in numbers for the call are provided along with a webcast link for those pre-registered. The full details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Subzero Labs raises $20M to build real-world network; funded by Pantera Capital, Variant, Coinbase Ventures, and others.
data.description: A company based in New York, Subzero Labs, has recently revealed itself to the public after securing $20 million in its first round of financing. The funding was primarily provided by Pantera Capital, with other notable contributors including Variant, Coinbase Ventures, Hashed, Susquehanna Crypto, Mysten Labs, Fabric Ventures, and Mirana Ventures.

data.title: Kinetic Seas introduces Skilliks, an AI-driven platform combining project management, training, HR, and DevOps for software projects.
data.description: A cutting-edge enterprise platform has been launched, integrating project management, training, HR, and DevOps into one advanced AI-driven system. This all-encompassing platform revolutionizes business operations by streamlining multiple essential functions. The singular AI-powered system eliminates the need for separate tools and enhances efficiency. Businesses can now seamlessly handle project management, training, HR tasks, and DevOps within a unified interface. This innovative solution optimizes workflow processes and boosts productivity, offering a more cohesive approach to managing various aspects of business operations.

data.title: FDA approves new blood volume analysis system by Daxor Corp, fast tracking medical advancements.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, the lowest it has been in the last decade. This positive trend is a result of the creation of 250,000 new jobs in the past quarter. The report also highlighted a significant increase in average wages by 3.2% over the same period. The government officials have welcomed these statistics as a sign of a strengthening economy and are optimistic about future growth prospects. The data reflects a promising outlook for both job seekers and the overall workforce in the country.

data.title: Sabre Corporation released its Q2 2025 earnings, with the results available on its Investor Relations website today.
data.description: Today, Sabre Corporation (NASDAQ: SABR) based in Southlake, Texas, disclosed its financial outcomes for the quarter concluding on June 30, 2025. The company has uploaded its earnings release and presentation for the second quarter of 2025 on its Investor Relations page.

data.title: Sempra's Q2 2025 earnings: $461M (GAAP), $0.71 diluted EPS, down from $713M in Q2 2024 per PRNewswire.
data.description: On August 7, 2025, Sempra (NYSE: SRE) disclosed their second-quarter 2025 earnings, which were reported as $461 million or $0.71 per diluted share. These figures were prepared following Generally Accepted Accounting Principles (GAAP). In comparison, the second-quarter 2024 GAAP earnings for Sempra were $713 million.

BoE Gov. Bailey: Risks are quite real and very apparent on both inflation and growth.

data.title: Cizzle Brands appoints retired NFL star Ndamukong Suh to Board of Directors, effective August 7, 2025.
data.description: In Toronto, Cizzle Brands Corporation (Cboe Canada: CZZL) (OTCQB: CZZLF) (Frankfurt: 8YF) has welcomed retired NFL player Ndamukong Suh to its Board of Directors, starting from August 7, 2025. Suh, a former NFL star, boasts a Super Bowl victory, three First-Team All-Pro selections, and five Pro Bowl appearances during his 13-season career with the Detroit Lions, Miami Dolphins, Los Angeles Rams, Tampa Bay Buccaneers, and Philadelphia Eagles.
